name: Ras Asfour (Lentil Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Shaarla, or vermicelli (broken into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse lentils and drain, picking out any discolored ones.
2. Combine with 5-6 cups water in a large kettle and bring to a boil.
3. Lower heat and simmer for 20 minutes, skimming off foam as it forms on top.
4. While the lentils are cooking, combine ground meat with parsley, salt, and pepper. Form into small meatballs and chill until needed.
5. Heat olive oil and saute onion until soft and golden. Reserve.
6. When lentils are soft, mash them with the back of a spoon to thicken the soup.
7. Add shaarla (or vermicelli) and meatballs. Cook 10-15 minutes longer, until meatballs are cooked through.
8. To serve, divide onion slices among 6 bowls. Stir lemon juice into soup and ladle over onions.
Makes 6-8 servings.
